checks.notes: On-board I2C2 DPS310 — R11/R12 = 4.7kΩ; bus C ≤50pF upper bound. Layout refines C post-4f.
External I2C1 GPS+mag — cable C dominates; R21/R22 = 4.7kΩ. If FAIL, lower R to 2.2kΩ or run 100kHz only.

result.interpretation: With 4.7kΩ pullups, I²C bus cap budget for 400kHz operation is ~53 pF. On-board I2C2 stays within this; external I2C1 GPS+mag cable may not — defer to 100kHz if needed.
